kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=mysession, url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts path_url=/posts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '76', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "chetan", "title": "software engineer", "age": "30", "userId": "1"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts path_url=/posts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
